mapper.sql: id, answer_code, question_id, sort_order, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM questionnaire_answer WHERE question_id = #{questionId} AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY sort_order, created_time LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM questionnaire_answer WHERE question_id = #{questionId} AND delete_flag = 0
SELECT FROM questionnaire_answer WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO questionnaire_answer (answer_code, question_id, sort_order, created_by, created_time, delete_flag) VALUES (#{answerCode}, #{questionId}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE questionnaire_answer SET sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
UPDATE questionnaire_answer SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE questionnaire_answer SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}
UPDATE questionnaire_answer SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, answer_id, answer_text, language, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, delete_flag FROM questionnaire_answer_text WHERE answer_id = #{answerId} AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY language
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO questionnaire_answer_text (answer_id, answer_text, language, created_by, created_time, delete_flag) VALUES (#{answerId}, #{answerText}, #{language}, #{createdBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE questionnaire_answer_text SET answer_text = #{answerText}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
UPDATE questionnaire_answer_text SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE answer_id = #{answerId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM questionnaire_answer_text WHERE answer_id = #{answerId} AND language = #{language} AND delete_flag = 0
AND id != #{excludeId}
